test_suite: B2′-b Mainnet Blue-Chip Contract FP Regression Test
disclaimer: Contract sources are structurally faithful representations preserving key patterns, not verbatim mainnet bytecode decompilations.

acceptance_criteria.hard_gate: All 4 contracts must NOT produce HIGH or CRITICAL. Any HIGH/CRITICAL = test FAIL.
acceptance_criteria.soft_target: WETH and DAI target LOW; USDC and USDT allow LOW or MEDIUM.
acceptance_criteria.medium_requirement: Any MEDIUM result must include per-function explanation (pattern name + structural noise attribution).
acceptance_criteria.fail_condition: Any HIGH/CRITICAL, OR any unexplainable pattern amplification.

contracts.name: WETH9
contracts.source_provenance: Canonical WETH9, widely public domain, Solidity 0.4.18
contracts.known_risk: .transfer() triggers missing_reentrancy_guard but 2300 gas stipend makes reentrancy infeasible in practice

contracts.name: DAI
contracts.known_risk: None expected — no external calls in any function

contracts.name: USDT
contracts.known_risk: Legacy style may cause structural noise; no external calls expected to trigger patterns

contracts.name: USDC
contracts.source_provenance: Circle FiatTokenV2_2, Solidity 0.6.12, implementation behind proxy
contracts.known_risk: Complex role management and many public functions may create moderate embedding distance; no external calls
